# PingWatch

PingWatch is an uptime monitoring SaaS for websites and APIs.

It helps developers, indie hackers, and small SaaS teams know immediately when a site or API goes down.

## Core use cases
- Website uptime monitoring
- API uptime monitoring
- Telegram downtime alerts
- Discord downtime alerts
- Slack downtime alerts
- Email downtime alerts
- Incident history tracking
- Recovery alerts when a site comes back online

## Best for
- Indie hackers
- Solo developers
- Small SaaS teams
- Side projects
- Landing pages
- APIs and backend services

## Main pages
- https://pingwatch.netlify.app/
- https://pingwatch.netlify.app/pricing.html
- https://pingwatch.netlify.app/telegram-alerts.html
- https://pingwatch.netlify.app/free-uptime-monitoring.html
- https://pingwatch.netlify.app/api-uptime-monitoring.html

## Short description
PingWatch checks your website or API automatically and sends instant alerts when it goes down.

## Contact
- Website: https://pingwatch.netlify.app/
